title: Shap Mochan
actors: Sital Bannerjee, Gangapada Basu, Bibha Bhattacharya
plot: Mhanedra Mukhopadhaya ( Uttam Kumar ) is a descendant of a musician family. One of his forefathers was cursed by his guru that anyone in his family who would practice music will either die prematurely or be disabled because he ins...
